src: A sleek L-shaped sofa in smooth gray leather with plush cushions, featuring a minimalist design and metallic legs. Comes with dark gray and beige cushions, wide seating areas, low backrests, and understated stitching.
edit: An L-shaped sectional sofa with a wooden frame and soft gray fabric. It features plush cushions, tapered wooden legs, and dark gray and soft beige cushions. It offers generously proportioned seats, reflecting mid-century modern style.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: A sofa is diagonally positioned in the living room corner with hardwood floors and a blue patterned rug partially underneath. To the left is a lamp and a door, with cushions on the sofa.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: A sofa viewed from a lower angle, showing its full length against wooden floors and a corner wall. A rug with patterns is on the right, a lamp is in the background, and pillows are on the sofa.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The sofa is viewed from above, showing its layout against hardwood floors, with a doorway and dining area in the background, a blue rug partially visible, a small speaker in the corner, and neatly placed cushions.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The sofa is central against a plain wall with wooden floors, cushions are perfectly arranged. In front, a small rustic table on a blue patterned rug.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: A mid-century-modern sofa positioned diagonally in a corner of the living room on sleek hardwood floors. A blue geometric-patterned rug lies partially under the sofa. To the left, a minimalist lamp and wooden door. Retro cushions are placed on the sofa.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A mid-century modern sofa viewed from a lower angle shows its sleek lines against wooden floors and a retro corner wall. A geometric-patterned rug is on the right side, with a sculptural lamp and bold-patterned pillows completing the theme.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A sofa with clean lines and tapered legs, viewed from above on hardwood floors, near a doorway to a dining area with curvy chairs in mid-century modern style. A blue geometric rug, small rectangular speaker, and colorful cushions enhance the sleek style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A mid-century-modern sofa with cushions is set against a minimalist wall with wooden floors. In front, a rustic table on a textured rug with geometric patterns. Soft lighting highlights the sofa's sleek lines, emphasizing mid-century-modern aesthetics.
